texto: Class is mostly a way to find something in myself I didn't know was there. Learning doesn't fill me up so much as opens me up. Shakes me loose and throws me off my habits -- might even rearrange me. It's like if you only rode Brandy and not Geronimo or Elvis. Once in a while I want to get on a horse that scares me sideways.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charlie Quimby: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Class is mostly a way to find something in myself I didn't know was there. Learning doesn't fill …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, learning, class pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
